---
title: "4.1.1 System software and application software"
subtitle: "Software hierarchy and types · P147-P148"
format:
  clean-revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .reveal .term { color: #cf1f2e; font-weight: 700; }
        .reveal .mark { background: #fff36d; padding: 0 0.08em; }
        .reveal .tight-list li { margin-bottom: 0.24em; }
        .reveal .figure-note { font-size: 0.82em; line-height: 1.28; }
        .reveal .figure-placeholder { border: 1px dashed #8aa0bf; border-radius: 8px; background: #f4f8ff; color: #40526b; padding: 1.1em 1.3em; margin: 0.8em 0; font-size: 0.9em; text-align: center; }
        .reveal .clean-table table { font-size: 0.74em; line-height: 1.1; }
        .reveal .clean-table th, .reveal .clean-table td { padding: 0.24em 0.34em; vertical-align: top; }
        </style>
lang: zh-CN
---

## Course Directory

### Return to the main outline

[← Back to Unit 4 Directory / 返回 Unit 4 目录](../../index.html)

## Software and Hardware

### Why software is needed

All computers begin life as a group of connected <span class="term">hardware</span> (硬件) items. Without <span class="term">software</span> (软件), the hardware items would be useless.

This section considers the link between hardware and software.

::: {.figure-placeholder}
Figure 4.1 Software and hardware hierarchy screenshot placeholder
:::

## Two Types of Software

### System software and application software

There are two types of software:

::: {.clean-table}
| Type | Core idea |
|---|---|
| <span class="term">System software</span> (系统软件) | Programs that allow the <span class="mark">hardware to run properly</span> and allow the user to communicate with the computer |
| <span class="term">Application software</span> (应用软件) | Programs that allow the user to do <span class="mark">specific tasks</span> |
:::

::: {.figure-placeholder}
Figure 4.2 Software types screenshot placeholder
:::

## System Software

### General features

<span class="term">System software</span> is a set of programs used to control and manage the operation of computer hardware.

::: {.tight-list}
- provides a <span class="mark">platform</span> on which other software can run
- required to allow hardware and software to run without problems
- provides a <span class="term">human computer interface (HCI)</span> (人机界面)
- controls the allocation and usage of hardware resources
:::

## Application Software

### General features

<span class="term">Application software</span> is used to perform various applications (apps) on a computer.

::: {.tight-list}
- allows a user to perform <span class="mark">specific tasks</span> using the computer's resources
- may be a single program, for example <span class="term">NotePad</span>
- may be a suite of programs, for example <span class="term">Microsoft Office</span>
- can be executed by the user as and when they require
:::

## Classroom Check

### Explain the two software types

A complete answer should include:

::: {.tight-list}
- hardware alone would be useless without software
- <span class="term">system software</span> controls and manages hardware operation
- system software provides a platform and an HCI
- <span class="term">application software</span> lets the user perform specific tasks
- application software may be a single program or a suite
:::

## Bridge

### Next: Application software examples

The next deck looks at examples of application software.

## End

### Return to the main outline

[← Back to Unit 4 Directory / 返回 Unit 4 目录](../../index.html)
